title: Segmented
description: Single-value pill-group selector with a sliding indicator. Ideal for switching views or short filters.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Each segment can have an optional icon to the left of the label.

colors.title: Colors
colors.desc: Semantic variants applied to the text and indicator of the active segment.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three heights for different UI densities.

fullWidth.title: Full width
fullWidth.desc: With full-width the track fills the container and segments share the width equally.

props.items: Segment list \{ value, label?, icon?, disabled?, ariaLabel? \}.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the active segment.
props.radius: Corner radius of the track and segments.
props.fullWidth: Stretches the control to fill the container; segments share the width.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the active segment changes (syncs v-model).

types.title: SegmentedItem
types.desc: Shape of each segment in the items array. Import it to type your data before passing it to the component.
types.value: Unique value emitted via update:modelValue when selected. Must be a string or number.
types.label: Visible label. Optional when an icon is provided.
types.icon: Optional leading icon rendered to the left of the label.
types.disabled: When true, the segment is visible but not selectable.
types.ariaLabel: Override the accessible name. Required when label is omitted.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus into or out of the segmented control
a11y.ariaGroup: The wrapper is exposed as a radiogroup for screen readers
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the radiogroup
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.focusGroup: Arrow keys cycle between segments; Tab moves focus out of the group
a11y.focusDisabled: Disabled segments remain visible but are skipped by keyboard navigation
